name: Ubiquiti Camera G6 Bullet White
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Camera G6 Bullet – 4K Outdoor Security Camera
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Camera G6 Bullet – 4K Outdoor Security Camera
short_description: 8MP 4K video, 30 FPS, 109.9° FOV, IR night vision up to 30m, IP66 weatherproof, built-in microphone, UniFi Protect integration, NDAA compliant.
description: The UVC-G6-Bullet-W is equipped with a 1/1.8" 8MP CMOS sensor, delivering ultra-high-definition 4K video at 3864 x 2160 resolution. Its fixed focal length lens provides a wide field of view: horizontal 109.9°, vertical 56.7°, and diagonal 134.1°, ensuring comprehensive area coverage. The camera supports a maximum frame rate of 30 FPS, capturing smooth and detailed footage. Advanced image settings include brightness, contrast, sharpness, saturation, white balance, exposure control, 2D and 3D noise reduction, motion-based noise reduction, masking, text overlay, and HDR, allowing for precise image optimization in various lighting conditions. The camera features built-in infrared (IR) LEDs with an automatic IR cut filter, enabling clear night vision up to 30 meters. This ensures reliable surveillance in low-light or complete darkness, maintaining high image quality around the clock.

detailed_description.heading: High-Resolution Imaging
detailed_description.text: The UVC-G6-Bullet-W is equipped with a 1/1.8" 8MP CMOS sensor, delivering ultra-high-definition 4K video at 3864 x 2160 resolution. Its fixed focal length lens provides a wide field of view: horizontal 109.9°, vertical 56.7°, and diagonal 134.1°, ensuring comprehensive area coverage. The camera supports a maximum frame rate of 30 FPS, capturing smooth and detailed footage. Advanced image settings include brightness, contrast, sharpness, saturation, white balance, exposure control, 2D and 3D noise reduction, motion-based noise reduction, masking, text overlay, and HDR, allowing for precise image optimization in various lighting conditions. The camera features built-in infrared (IR) LEDs with an automatic IR cut filter, enabling clear night vision up to 30 meters. This ensures reliable surveillance in low-light or complete darkness, maintaining high image quality around the clock.

detailed_description.heading: Integration with UniFi Protect
detailed_description.text: The G6 Bullet integrates seamlessly with the UniFi Protect application suite, offering centralized management and real-time monitoring through web and mobile platforms. It features a 10/100 Mbps Ethernet interface for network connectivity and includes a built-in microphone for audio recording. The camera's firmware supports advanced features such as HDR imaging and smart detection analytics, enhancing situational awareness. Leveraging AI technology, the G6 Bullet camera offers intelligent event detection capabilities, including recognition of people, vehicles, animals, faces, and license plates. This enhances security monitoring by providing accurate and timely alerts. Compliance with NDAA regulations ensures suitability for government and enterprise deployments.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Construction
detailed_description.text: Designed for outdoor use, the UVC-G6-Bullet-W boasts an IP66-rated weatherproof enclosure, protecting it against dust and heavy rain. Its IK04 impact resistance rating ensures durability against vandalism. The camera operates reliably in temperatures ranging from -20°C to 50°C and humidity levels up to 90% (non-condensing). It supports Power over Ethernet (PoE) with a voltage range of 37–57V DC and a maximum power consumption of 9.9W. Mounting options include wall and ceiling installations, with additional accessories available for pole or junction box mounting, providing flexibility for various deployment scenarios. The package includes the camera unit, mounting hardware, and installation guide, facilitating straightforward setup and integration into existing security systems.

items.name: Night Mode
items.value: IR LED Illumination and IR Cut Filter, IR Range up to 30 m

items.name: Mounting Method
items.value: Wall Mount, Ceilling Mount, Pole Mount
